title: IDP Education India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: IDP Education India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the IDP Education India family as a Subject Matter Expert in Tiruchirappalli. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About IDP Education India:
IDP Education India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IDP Education India!
